segments.text: I am the true vine, and My Father is the vinedresser.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Every branch in Me that does not bear fruit He takes away; and every branch that bears fruit He prunes, that it may bear more fruit.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You are already clean because of the word which I have spoken to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Abide in Me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, unless it abides in the vine, neither can you, unless you abide in Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I am the vine, you are the branches. He who abides in Me, and I in him, bears much fruit; for without Me you can do nothing.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If anyone does not abide in Me, he is cast out as a branch and is withered; and they gather them and throw them into the fire, and they are burned.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you abide in Me, and My words abide in you, you will ask what you desire, and it shall be done for you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: By this My Father is glorified, that you bear much fruit; so you will be My disciples.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As the Father loved Me, I also have loved you; abide in My love.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you keep My commandments, you will abide in My love, just as I have kept My Father's commandments and abide in His love.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: These things I have spoken to you, that My joy may remain in you, and that your joy may be full.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: This is My commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Greater love has no one than this, than to lay down one's life for his friends.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You are My friends if you do whatever I command you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: No longer do I call you servants, for a servant does not know what his master is doing; but I have called you friends, for all things that I heard from My Father I have made known to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You did not choose Me, but I chose you and appointed you that you should go and bear fruit, and that your fruit should remain, that whatever you ask the Father in My name He may give you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: These things I command you, that you love one another.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If the world hates you, you know that it hated Me before it hated you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you were of the world, the world would love its own. Yet because you are not of the world, but I chose you out of the world, therefore the world hates you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remember the word that I said to you, 'A servant is not greater than his master.' If they persecuted Me, they will also persecute you. If they kept My word, they will keep yours also.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But all these things they will do to you for My name's sake, because they do not know Him who sent Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would have no sin, but now they have no excuse for their sin.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who hates Me hates My Father also.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If I had not done among them the works which no one else did, they would have no sin; but now they have seen and also hated both Me and My Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But this happened that the word might be fulfilled which is written in their law, 'They hated Me without a cause.'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when the Helper comes, whom I shall send to you from the Father, the Spirit of truth who proceeds from the Father, He will testify of Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And you also will bear witness, because you have been with Me from the beginning.
segments.speaker: Jesus
